Watchdog driver interface for initialization, starting, feeding, and checking reset flags.

# Purpose
This C header file defines the interface for a watchdog timer module. It includes function declarations for initializing ([`watchdog_init`](<#watchdog_init>)), starting ([`watchdog_start`](<#watchdog_start>)), and feeding ([`watchdog_feed`](<#watchdog_feed>)) the watchdog timer. The module also provides functions to check ([`watchdog_check_reset_flag`](<#watchdog_check_reset_flag>)) and clear ([`watchdog_clear_reset_flag`](<#watchdog_clear_reset_flag>)) the reset flag, which indicates if a reset was triggered by the watchdog. The file includes the `stdbool.h` library for boolean type support and references the `mcu_reboot_reason.h` header for handling microcontroller reboot reasons. The use of `#pragma once` ensures the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdbool.h`
- `drivers/mcu_reboot_reason.h`
